# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

Use these files before proposing changes:

- `docs/90_全域AI開發守則.md`
- `docs/10_開發回顧與防錯守則.md`

Rules:

- Follow global guardrails for debugging, testing, and environment diagnosis.
- Follow the project-specific lessons for local behavior and prior mistakes.
- Keep any new long-form lesson in the shared documents instead of repeating it here.
- To update global rules: edit `D:\Vincent\AI-Knowledge\global\90_全域AI開發守則.md`, then run `scripts\sync-ai-knowledge.ps1`.
